headline: YOUR QUALITY SYSTEM, FULLY CONNECTED
subheading: How ICH Q10's four elements and two enablers keep your site in a state of control.
flux_prompt: An abstract editorial illustration of an interconnected pharmaceutical quality system: four luminous interlocking glass rings arranged in a balanced lifecycle loop, linked by glowing teal and cyan filaments that trace continuous flowing data pathways and gentle trend curves between them, suggesting integration, feedback loops and a sustained state of control. Two faint translucent threads weave through every ring as underlying enablers, knowledge and risk, binding the structure together. Set against a deep navy gradient backdrop with soft volumetric depth, polished frosted-glass and brushed-metal textures, delicate floating particles and crystalline nodes catching cool light. One subtle fresh-green status point glows softly at a key junction as a sign of health and improvement. Clinical-luxury mood, premium, sterile, trustworthy, uncluttered negative space on the left for overlaid text. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
